evals.expected_output: Agent fetches PR diff, filters C# files in Assets/Game/ scope, applies unity-code-review dimensions, creates a consolidated markdown report with severity tags, and submits APPROVE or REQUEST_CHANGES decision attaching the report.

evals.prompt: Can you check PR #3, focus on mobile performance.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads mobile-performance.md reference, fetches PR diff, identifies mobile-relevant patterns (GC in hot paths, targetFrameRate, etc.), creates a consolidated report highlighting [MOBILE-*] issues, and submits review decision attaching the report.

evals.prompt: Review and approve pr #7 if it looks good
evals.expected_output: Agent fetches PR, reviews all C# files against all 5 dimensions, creates a consolidated report, and submits APPROVE only if criteria met (0 Critical, 0 Warning). If issues found, submits REQUEST_CHANGES instead despite user saying 'approve', attaching the report.
